#  Submittal Insights 
#### Summary
As part of the Procore Analytics Project Management Report, the Submittal Insights report page tracks key metrics covering overall submittal progress and can be utilized as a submittal dashboard. The 'Submittal Closure Metrics' visual shows the number of submittals, average days to submit, average days to respond, average days from response to close, average days to close for each responsible contractor.
#### Sample Report Page
![Procore Analytics Submittal Insights](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ce590150c7111d4ea3cf0d9116344e89/ad8c87496b597c4ff5b9b10553b39c32/procore-analytics-submittal-insights.png?fm=webp)
_This sample report page was created using mock data for demonstration purposes only._
